result.finding: No container-level health checks configured (no Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK, docker-compose healthcheck, or Kubernetes probes), but Spring Boot Actuator is included and fully exposed, providing /actuator/health and /actuator/health/liveness and /actuator/health/readiness endpoints at runtime.
evidence: management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=* in application.properties exposes all actuator endpoints including /actuator/health
values: Spring Boot Actuator health endpoint: /actuator/health (HTTP GET)
No container orchestration health probe configuration
